Title: The Battle for Wesnoth
Description: The Battle for Wesnoth is an open source, turn-based strategy game with a high fantasy theme. It features both singleplayer and online/hotseat multiplayer combat.

Title: No, I Won't Download Your App. The Web Version is A-OK.
Description: As someone who prefers using services via their websites, I’ve gotten terribly jaded lately. Almost everyone wants me, and by extension, you, to use their darn apps to consume content and off their web versions.

Title: Surveillance Findings: Age Verification as Mass Surveillance Infrastructure
Description: OSINT investigation documenting how age verification laws across three countries funnel citizen biometric data through a 269-check surveillance pipeline with government reporting capabilities.

Title: AI Did It in 12 Minutes. It Took Me 10 Hours to Fix It

Title: Advanced Search for YouTube - Playlists.at
Description: Advanced search for YouTube videos with filters for duration, date, title, and more.

Title: GitHub - arman-bd/guppylm: A ~9M parameter LLM that talks like a small fish.
Description: A ~9M parameter LLM that talks like a small fish. Contribute to arman-bd/guppylm development by creating an account on GitHub.

Title: Microsoft Hasn’t Had a Coherent GUI Strategy Since Petzold

Title: The Free Market Lie: Why Switzerland Has 25 Gbit Internet and America Doesn't
Description: The Free Market Lie: Why Switzerland Has 25 Gbit Internet and America Doesn't

Title: ABS  (Anti-Lock Brakes) - How They Work and Why You Care!
Description: From the history of early ABS systems to the latest complex vehicle stability controls, Dave takes you on a journey from 1970 to the present, covering how and why ABS brakes work.
